titles.title: Show a Little Bit of Love and Kindness – v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Show a little bit of love and kindness, Never go around with hatred's blindness Take a little time to reach for joy and wear a happy face. Sing a little bit when the days are dreary, Give a little help to a friend that's weary That's the way to make the world a happy place.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Offer help, Offer help; Bring some hope, Bring some hope To the weakened and discouraged on life's road. See a need, see a need Lend a hand, lend a hand There are many who are crushed Beneath life's blows
